rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.032 governs out-of-state political committee contribution limits and disclosures. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter.
quote: Sec. 253.032. LIMITATION ON CONTRIBUTION BY OUT-OF-STATE COMMITTEE.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and election code contribution limitations.
